en: We're back to that? Are we back there?
What about the past couple of days? They happened, you know?
ko: 지난 며칠은 어쩌고? 그건 일어난 일이야, 알지?

en: I know that they happened, and they were wonderful.
But they were also very irresponsible.
I have a fiancee waiting for me at a hotel who's
ko: 호텔에서 나를 기다리고 있는 약혼자가 있어.

en: going to be crushed when he finds out what I did.
ko: 그가 내가 한 일을 알게 되면 상처받을 거야.

en: So you make love to me, and then you go back to your husband?
ko: 그래서 나와 사랑을 나누고, 다시 남편에게 돌아가는 거야?

en: Was that your plan? Was that a test that I don't pass? No, I made a promise to a man.
ko: 그게 네 계획이었어? 내가 통과하지 못한 시험이야? 아니, 나는 한 남자에게 약속했어.

en: He gave me a ring, and I gave him my word.
ko: 그는 나에게 반지를 주었고, 나는 그에게 내 약속을 했어.

en: And your word is shot to hell now, don't you think? I don't know. I'll find out when I talk to him.
ko: 그리고 네 약속은 이제 망가졌다고 생각하지 않아? 모르겠어. 그와 이야기해봐야 알겠지.

en: This is not about keeping your promise,
and it's not about following your heart. It's about security. What is that supposed to mean?
ko: 마음을 따르는 문제도 아니야. 이건 안전에 관한 거야. 그게 무슨 뜻이야?

en: Money! What are you talking? He's got a lot of money. Now I hate you, you slow bastard. Well, I hate you. If you leave here, I hate you.
ko: 돈이야! 무슨 소리 하는 거야? 그는 돈이 많아. 이제 너를 싫어해, 느린 놈. 나도 너를 싫어해. 여기 떠나면, 정말 싫어.

en: I'm not paying any attention to anything that's been happening to me.
ko: 나는 내게 일어난 일에 전혀 신경 쓰지 않고 있어.
